name: Products Sideview
description: This block displays product selectors with custom features + Monthly/Yearly options

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: Price: add list of products(montly, yearly) to be used
SelectMemembers: list of devices members to appear on selector/dropdown
Default-Selection: add the one to be selected by default
Note: if you use the monthly product the radio group will have monthly selected by default, same goes for yearly
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
